title: Design a Blog Post Card
description: A blog post card component with a full-width cover image, a content area with a title, excerpt, and a styled Read More button. CSS covers background colors, border-radius for rounded corners, box-shadow, a bottom border on the image, padding, non-default text colors, margins, and a hover effect on the button.
objectives: Use border-radius to create rounded corners on a card
Use box-shadow to give a card a subtle elevation effect
Style an image to fill its container's full width with width: 100%
Add a border-bottom to separate the image from card content
Style a link as a button with display: inline-block, padding, and border-radius
Use a :hover pseudo-class to change button background color
